title: savory intense uruguayan ackee paella
description: this traditional uruguayan dish features the rich sweetness of ackee, the savory flavor of bonito, and the comforting warmth of cheese. perfect for a cold evening meal.

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: yellow or white, whichever you prefer

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: flaky sea salt or kosher, whichever you prefer

instructions: heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
add the sliced uruguayan sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
remove the sausage from the pan and set aside.
add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
add the bonito flakes and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
add the chopped ackee and cook for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
add the white wine and cook until reduced, about 2-3 minutes.
add the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
add the tomato paste and stir to combine.
add the cooked sausage back to the pan and stir to combine.
add the grated cheese and stir to combine.
season with salt and black pepper to taste.
cover the pan with foil and transfer to the oven.
bake for 20-25 minutes, until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
remove the pan from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
